nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: Barau's petrel
nodes.summary: Barau's petrel（Barau's petrel，学名 Pterodroma baraui），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括猎捕压力、污染。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It has a highly restricted breeding range and has suffered hunting pressure in the past

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: While the shooting of the species has now been stopped, and the population seems to have recovered, it is currently threatened by introduced species (especially feral cats, who threaten both chicks and adults) and light pollution
